  "analysis": "The environment is ready but the direct decoder-layer inspection failed because LlamaDecoderLayer in transformers 5.12 requires position_embeddings (RoPE cos/sin). No implementation file has been successfully written yet; the previous attempt was incomplete.",
  "plan": "Inspect the installed transformers Llama source for forward signatures, rotary embedding handling, and decoder-layer return format. Then use that information to write a complete and correct /app/pipeline_parallel.py and run multi-process verification.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 - <<'PY'
import inspect
from transformers.models import llama
print('FILE', llama.__file__)
from transformers.models.llama import modeling_llama as ml
for n in ['LlamaModel','LlamaDecoderLayer','LlamaForCausalLM']:
    obj = getattr(ml, n)
    print('\\n###', n)
    print('forward sig:', inspect.signature(obj.forward))
    src = inspect.getsource(obj.forward)
    print(src[:5000])
PY
",
      "duration": 1.0
